programme.title: El zoo de Zu
programme.desc: El tio Pasarino hace nidos para los jabirus y abuela confiesa que extraña las fiestas de su niñez en el Pantanal. Los niños planean una para ella.

programme.title: El zoo de Zu
programme.desc: Eric encuentra una talentosa tecladista para su banda musical; a todos les agrada menos a Zu, quién sospecha que ella está en el zoológico para atrapar un extraño animal y huir.

programme.title: Doki
programme.sub-title: La Carrera de Barcos / La Obra Maestra de Fico
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de Doki trata de hacer una carrera con un barco de papel en el arroyo, el agua vuelca los barcos.

programme.title: Doki
programme.desc: Cada año, Fico se las ingenia para hallar su regalo de cumpleaños y arruinar la sorpresa. Por eso este año deciden mantenerlo ocupado para que no fisgonee.

programme.title: Doki
programme.sub-title: La Fiesta de Disfraces; La Princesa Anabella
programme.desc: El equipo Doki da una fiesta espeluznante con disfraces, pero se preocupan de que no sea lo suficientemente espeluznante.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Nabi se arriesga a perder su récord perfecto de satisfacción de los huéspedes cuando no puede entender la petición de su nuevo huésped hiperactivo.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble anima a Nabi a que se haga un peinado con su Hairiet, una huésped con estilo. Pero Nabi se esfuerza por decirle a Bubble que le gusta su pelo tal y como es.

programme.title: El zoo de Zu
programme.desc: Zu, Eric, Nuno y Vovo deciden pasar la noche en el zoológico para hacer una piyamada y conmemorar un eclipse lunar.

programme.title: Doki
programme.sub-title: Cruce de cangrejos; Ciudad de cometas
programme.desc: Gracias a Mundi, invitan al equipo a la isla de Navidad, en Australia, para construir un puente para cangrejos. Gabi no logra hacer volar su cometa y Doki viaja a Japón para asistir a un festival de cometas y aprender lo necesario para ayudar a Gabi.

programme.title: Doki
programme.desc: Cuando Doki se encuentra una moneda antigua en la playa, atrapa al insecto cazador de tesoros.

programme.title: Doki
programme.desc: Luego de ahorrar por meses, Doki pudo comprar un guante de béisbol. Pero no le alcanza para la pelota.

programme.title: Rescatando propiedades con Tarek
programme.desc: Una pareja está luchando por ganar suficiente dinero para mantener a sus cuatro hijos. Descubrir que su nueva propiedad comparte un camino de entrada con una lavandería automática.

programme.title: Rescatando propiedades con Tarek
programme.sub-title: Subidas y bajadas en las colinas
programme.desc: Dos amigos, agentes inmobiliarios, quieren reformar una vivienda, pero se han fijado en una especialmente complicada.

programme.title: Rescatando propiedades con Tarek
programme.desc: Legacy y Patricia quieren obtener mayores ganancias con una casa de 670 metros cuadrados en Studio City. Patricia tiene una visión de diseño audaz que tanto Legacy como Tarek respaldan.

programme.title: Rescatando propiedades con Tarek
programme.desc: Dos pilotos comerciales y padres que esperan un hijo sueñan con su primera renovación, pero convertir una casa de 60 metros cuadrados en el sueño de un comprador no será sencillo. Tarek deben enseñarles a superar obstáculos.

programme.title: Rescatando propiedades con Tarek
programme.sub-title: Ojalá que el comprador tenga un perro

programme.title: Rescatando propiedades con Tarek
programme.desc: Un agente de bienes raíces y un diseñador tienen los ingredientes de un equipo de ensueño, pero un estrecho margen de beneficio en su proyecto en Carson los hace buscar ayuda.

programme.title: Transformando casas con los El Moussa
programme.sub-title: Renovando una casa comprada al azar
programme.desc: Tarek y Adam lanzan una moneda al aire para decidir si comprar una casa. Heather descubre que su propiedad de 167 metros cuadrados podría tener solo 130. Esta compra podría convertirse en su mayor fracaso hasta el momento.

programme.title: Transformando casas con los El Moussa
programme.sub-title: Un buen dato sobre una buena renovación
programme.desc: Tarek y Heather Rae El Moussa están de regreso y renuevan algunas de las casas más desagradables en la carrera de Tarek.

programme.title: Transformando casas con los El Moussa
programme.desc: En un mercado inmobiliario difícil con mucha competencia, se debe competir con lo peor de lo peor para salir victoriosos.

programme.title: Chasing the West
programme.desc: Los empresarios de Texas recurren a los hermanos para encontrar una casa que refleje sus años de duro trabajo. Una pareja se da cuenta de que la vida en el campo no es para los débiles de corazón.

programme.desc: Dave y Jenny sorprenden a una familia de Tulsa con una renovación de 24 horas para su hija pequeña, que tiene cáncer. El plan es renovar la casa con una piscina en el patio trasero, pero con las inspecciones y retrasos, podrían no terminar a tiempo.

programme.desc: Leading scientists and Egyptologists use state-of-the-art forensics to investigate the Niagara Falls mummy and search for its true identity; how a legendary ancient Egyptian pharaoh ended up on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files
programme.desc: The mysterious mummy of Ramesses V reveals a shocking tale of bitter family rivalry, civil insurrection and a cause of death that ultimately pushed ancient Egypt to the edge of collapse.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A strange circular forest next to a notorious cannibal site; when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device; cutting-edge tech helps experts answer these sinister mysteries.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past; when a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life; cutting-edge tech reveals new clues to these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.sub-title: Blood in the Garden of Eden

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: Former CIA operative Mike Baker investigates top-secret government programs steeped in cutting-edge science; Mike speaks with experts, government officials and scientists to go deeper into the black files than ever before.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: Many U.S. government personnel have reported sustaining unexplained and debilitating neurological injuries while working abroad; Mike Baker investigates if these invisible, mind-altering attacks are evidence of active mind-control programs worldwide.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, a series of secret meetings were reported between US military brass and Hollywood filmmakers.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: Uncovered documents reveal a black file containing studies of werewolves, sprites and floating orbs; Mike Baker investigates how the U.S. government may have funded a classified program directly focused on the research of paranormal phenomena.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: An image of a pilot donning a Red Eagles patch is captured by photographers during a mysterious fighter jet training exercise; Mike Baker investigates if the U.S. Air Force has revived a black file squadron.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: Unidentified black triangles have been reported in flight over top-secret military bases for decades, and now, Mike Baker investigates if the US government is involved in developing experimental aircraft, or if this could be something otherworldly.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: Presidential Emergency Action Documents have the potential to grant the U.S. president unlimited authority; Mike Baker investigates how these files are among the most secretive documents in U.S. government and what might trigger their use.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified
programme.desc: In 2013, the USS Jimmy Carter deployed on a classified mission that received a presidential citation of heroism, and now, Mike Baker investigates how this attack submarine may be connected to one of the most daring black file operations in US history.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.desc: The Roman Empire fell in the year 476, yet questions linger; did it truly fall or does it continue as the Byzantine Empire? What caused its demise? The debate remains controversial even among modern historians.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.sub-title: El Dorado: Gold, Guns and Greed
programme.desc: El Dorado, the legendary city of gold, captivated Europeans in the 16th and 17th centuries, sparking endless quests for hidden treasures; fueled by greed, these expeditions led to the loss of countless lives.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.desc: Rameses II led Egypt through a sixty-year golden age as a powerful pharaoh; despite his recorded achievements, researchers investigate lingering mysteries regarding his wife Nefertari and his death.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.desc: Tutankhamun, Egypt's teenage pharaoh, leaves an enduring legacy in the 10 short years he ruled; given questions surrounding his untimely death, Tutankhamun remains one of history's enigmas.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.desc: Mary Magdalene appears twelve times in the Gospels yet remains a controversial figure; this exploration examines the wide variety of depictions and the limited historical facts known about her.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.desc: In 1532, Spanish conquistadors encounter the advanced Inca Empire; despite their sophisticated infrastructure, the Inca falls within decades; the story of how a powerful empire is overtaken by a small group of conquistadors remains mysterious.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
programme.sub-title: The Ten Plagues: A Greek Curse?
programme.desc: The ten plagues of Egypt are supposedly sent by God to convince Pharaoh to free the Israelites; some scientists link these events to a volcanic eruption or climate change; could these be natural occurrences or are they divine warnings?

programme.desc: Action sports friends go wing-suit flying from Monte Brento in the Italian Alps, which is a great place to try new tricks in a wing suit; for a paralyzed friend from Dubai, United Arab Emirates, it is also the perfect place to keep on jumping.

programme.desc: Jokke Sommer, Espen Fadnes and Niccolo Porcella reunite with family members, first, in the Alps and later on the island of Sardinia, where Niccolo was raised.

programme.desc: Nucky and Margaret find common ground in Atlantic City; Luciano encounters an old adversary; Sally Wheet makes a payment in Cuba; in 1884, young Nucky moves up the Commodore's ladder.

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Chalky returns to Atlantic City; Nucky arranges a meeting with Maranzano; Eli's reunion with June takes an unexpected turn; Capone considers relocating his operation; Margaret completes a deal with Carolyn Rothstein; Nucky gets bad news from Cuba.

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Chalky encounters Narcisse in Harlem; federal agents enlist the help of Eli and Van Alden to take down the Capone organization; Nucky is pained by a recent loss; in 1897, Nucky vents his frustration and roots out a young thief.

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky tries to hold onto his assets in Atlantic City; Willie and Eli become involved in Nucky's war; Maranzano meets his fate; Nucky reads a letter from Gillian; in 1897, Mabel and Nucky argue.

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky plans to relocate to Manhattan; Margaret impresses Nucky and a grain company stockholder; Luciano tends to unfinished business; William shares underworld details with his boss; Nucky visits Gillian; in 1897, Nucky copes with a family crisis.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

programme.title: Alien 3
programme.desc: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

programme.title: Alien Resurrection
programme.desc: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: 33 Photos From the Ghetto
programme.desc: Telling the story of the only known photographs from inside the Warsaw Ghetto during the April 1943 uprising and its brutal repression that were not taken by German forces.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: U.S. First Recon Marines prepare to invade Iraq; soldiers pass time while awaiting orders; a writer from "Rolling Stone" magazine becomes embedded with the unit.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: Bravo company heads toward Nasiriyah, where Alpha company is involved in a skirmish; a wrong turn causes Bravo to lag behind other companies.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: Bravo awaits new orders; Fick tries to take control of a dangerous situation; Godfather orders Bravo to trek through the night, treating all Iraqis as hostile.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: After a supply truck is looted, First Recon is down to one meal a day; Alpha must recover the body of a slain Marine; Bravo sets up a roadblock outside of Al Hayy.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: First Recon learns of an ambush on a bridge ahead from Iraqi locals; although LAVs assault the bridge first, Bravo still encounters complications when they cross.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: First Recon must escort civilians fleeing Baghdad down the highway; Ferrando itches to get back to fighting; First Recon has to go up against Iraqi armor with help from Marine reservists.

programme.title: Generation Kill
programme.desc: Bravo reaches Baghdad; First Recon sends out sporadic patrols into the city for information; Fick becomes disillusioned with the lack of plans; the men celebrate their last night in Baghdad.

programme.title: Path to War
programme.desc: This film is a dramatization of the decision-making behind the Johnson administration's escalation of the Vietnam War in the mid 1960s. As Lyndon Johnson (Michael Gambon) agonizes over sending more troops to Southeast Asia, he is given contradictory advice from Secretary of Defense Robert McNamara (Alec Baldwin) and Secretary of State Dean Rusk (John Aylward). The president also attempts to build his Great Society at home, while balancing the war's increasing drain on the nation's resources.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: Parthenope
programme.desc: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Gorillas in the Mist
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of wildlife expert Dian Fossey's autobiography. Midwesterner Fossey leaves the United States for Africa, where she studies the gorillas of Rwanda and Uganda. As Fossey develops a bond with the animals, she also becomes wary of the poachers who prey on them. Fearing that the gorillas will go extinct if humans continue to hunt them, she organizes a defense league to protect the animals; in doing so, though, she puts herself in a perilous situation.

programme.title: Sigourney Weaver, The Most Iconic Action Heroine
programme.desc: A look back at actress Sigourney Weaver's career in cinema and the impact of her roles in action, comedy and drama.

programme.title: Arthur

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Another Country
programme.desc: An interracial couple try to raise their child during the racially polarizing times of 1956 Mississippi.

programme.title: The Great Lillian Hall
programme.desc: Broadway actress Lillian Hall pours her heart and soul into preparing for her next big role but finds herself blindsided by confusion and forgetfulness. She strives to make it to opening night while holding on to her fading memories and identity.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

programme.title: Ex Machina
programme.desc: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: Swiss Army Man
programme.desc: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside of it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish stars in a sitcom written by artificial intelligence, which presents her with bizarre challenges.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish stars in a sitcom written by artificial intelligence, which presents her with bizarre challenges.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: When Aaliyah met Paula on Instagram, she realized she liked women for the first time, but as Nev and Kamie help find Paula, Aaliyah is blindsided by a huge realization that completely changes the course of her relationship.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brittany's reeling from such a bad breakup that she hopes she's being catfished by her ex wanting to get back together with her; Nev and Kamie hope to free Brittany from heartache and find out who's behind the mystery profile.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: They've been a fan of Cody for 13 years, and they recently fell in love, but Cody still refuses to meet or video chat.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Michael is a reality TV star that has fallen in love with his online dream girl, Julia, but he gets a reality check as the truth is uncovered.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Adam has fallen head over heels for online angel Mercy, but now she's asking for money and Adam is worried; with an engagement ring in hand, Nev and Kamie search to the ends of the Earth to help Adam find the love of his life.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Show Dogs
programme.desc: Max, un duro policía canino, se infiltra en un glamuroso concurso de belleza para perros con el objetivo de rescatar a una cría de oso panda que fue secuestrada. Le ayudará a cumplir la misión Frank, un agente humano del FBI.

programme.title: Sound of My Voice
programme.desc: Peter y Lorna, una pareja californiana, se prepara para realizar un documental en el que se expone a la carismática líder de un culto llamada Maggie como un fraude. Maggie asegura ser del año 2054 y es alérgica a casi todo lo que existe en el ambiente. Ella vive en un sótano, subsiste con oxígeno envasado, comida propia y sangre de los acólitos. Peter y Lorna insisten en que Maggie es una farsa, pero muy pronto son hechizados.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: La familia Portokalos está preocupada por Toula, que a los 30 años sigue soltera, pero la joven quiere ir a la universidad y dejar de trabajar en el restaurante familiar. Todo se complica cuando se enamora de un chico que no es de etnia griega.

programme.title: We Are Your Friends
programme.desc: Un aspirante a DJ se hace amigo de un colega veterano, pero la relación pende de un hilo cuando se enamora de su novia.

programme.title: Ruby Sparks
programme.desc: El joven escritor Calvin Weir-Fields, en el pasado un literato prestigioso, está teniendo problemas para hacer su siguiente novela. Después de un consejo de su terapeuta, Calvin utiliza una viaje máquina de escribir y crea a una vivaz mujer a la que llama Ruby Sparks. Ruby salta de la página a la casa de Calvin, adoptando la forma de una mujer real de carne y hueso. Ella no entiende que es un personaje ficticio y que sus acciones y sentimientos son dictados por lo que Calvin escribe.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: El detective de Hong Kong, Bennie Black, se une a un jugador americano para capturar al jefe del crimen que mató a su compañero y secuestró a su sobrina.

programme.title: Oracle
programme.desc: Una joven acepta un trabajo en una propiedad con un pasado tortuoso. A su llegada, pronto se da cuenta de que las pesadillas de su infancia están relacionadas con el mal de la casa.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: Una monja se suicida en una abadía rumana y el Vaticano envía a un sacerdote y una novicia a investigar lo sucedido. Lo que ambos encuentran allá es un secreto perverso que los enfrentará cara a cara con el mal en su esencia más pura.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: Francia, 1956. El asesinato de un sacerdote provoca que un mal demoníaco se extienda sin control. La hermana Irene deberá enfrentarse, de nuevo, a la monja satánica Valak.

programme.title: The Devil's Rejects
programme.desc: Los Firefly, una familia de asesinos, emprenden una sangrienta huida al escapar de un alguacil con sed de venganza.

programme.title: It
programme.desc: Varios niños de una pequeña ciudad del estado de Maine se alían para combatir a una entidad diabólica que adopta la forma de un payaso y desde hace mucho tiempo emerge cada 27 años para saciarse de sangre infantil.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: En el misterioso pueblo de Derry, un payaso llamado Pennywise vuelve 27 años después para atormentar a los ahora adultos miembros del Club de los Perdedores, que se encuentran alejados unos de otros.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Flash viaja a través del tiempo para evitar el asesinato de su madre, pero, sin saberlo, provoca una serie de cambios que originan la creación de un multiverso.

programme.title: A Damsel in Distress
programme.desc: The staff at Tottney Castle are taking bets on whom the young lady of the manor, Alyce Marshmorton (Joan Fontaine), will wed. When she meets American song-and-dance man Jerry Halliday (Fred Astaire), footman Albert (Harry Watson) schemes to make the mismatched pair fall in love so he'll win the bet. A romantic farce written by British humorist P.G. Wodehouse and based on his novel, the film features the last songs written for the screen by George Gershwin, who died during filming.

programme.title: The Canterville Ghost
programme.desc: When Sir Simon de Canterville (Charles Laughton) flees a joust in fear and retreats to the family castle, his father traps Simon and curses him to haunt the estate until a descendant restores the family honor with an act of bravery. Hundreds of years later, Cuffy Williams (Robert Young), an American soldier stationed at the castle, discovers from young Lady Jessica (Margaret O'Brien) that he is a relative. Cuffy hopes to free Simon from his curse by displaying courage when under duress.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: The story of a gentle-hearted beast in love with a simple and beautiful girl. She is drawn to the repellent but strangely fascinating Beast, who tests her fidelity by giving her a key, telling her that if she doesn't return it to him by a specific time, he will die of grief. She is unable to return the key on time, but it is revealed that the Beast is the genuinely handsome one. A simple tale of tragic love that turns into a surreal vision of death, desire, and beauty.

programme.title: Quentin Durward
programme.desc: When the Duke of Burgundy (Alec Clunes) tries to arrange a marriage between Lord Crawford (Ernest Thesiger) of Scotland and the young Countess of Marcroy (Kay Kendall) of France, Crawford sends dashing knight Quentin Durward (Robert Taylor) abroad to see if she is suitable. Quentin finds the countess has no interest in the marriage, and is seeking the protection of King Louis XI (Robert Morley). Undaunted, he takes a job with the king, and soon falls in love with the countess himself.

programme.title: Knights of the Round Table
programme.desc: Medieval tales of love and war as the gallant Sir Lancelot rides into battle beside King Arthur while harboring a secret love for his Queen. After successfully defending his beloved country, Arthur rewards his loyal soldier Lancelot by making him Queen Guinevere's champion, but Lancelot's happiness is shattered when Sir Mordred informs the King of his wife's clandestine relationship.

programme.title: The Prisoner of Zenda
programme.desc: This adventure-filled drama finds Englishman Rudolf Rassendyll (Ronald Colman) on vacation in a small European country, where he discovers his resemblance to the nation's royal heir-apparent, Rudolf V. When the king-to-be is drugged and incapacitated, Rassendyll must impersonate him, so that the scheming Duke Michael (Raymond Massey) can't assume the throne. To further complicate matters, Rassendyll starts to fall for Rudolf V's intended bride, Flavia (Madeleine Carroll).

programme.title: The Private Lives of Elizabeth and Essex
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth (Bette Davis) secretly loves the ambitious and courageous Earl of Essex (Errol Flynn), but at the same time she distrusts his desire for power, fearing he will exploit his political influence to her detriment. Though Essex's popularity soars when he returns victorious from a military campaign in Spain, Elizabeth instead chides him for prosecuting an unprofitable war. While the lovers quarrel, Sir Walter Raleigh (Vincent Price) schemes to bring about the downfall of Essex.

programme.title: Boxcar Bertha
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese's second feature loosely adapts the autobiography of Bertha Thompson, portraying the adventures of the Depression-era criminal following the death of her father. Bertha (Barbara Hershey) joins union organizer Big Bill Shelly (David Carradine) in fighting anti-union forces after an unexpected murder drives them to a life of robbing trains. The atmospheric tale depicts their life on the lam, doing whatever is necessary to survive.

programme.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
programme.desc: A teenager (P.J. Soles) and her friends get even with their principal to music by the Ramones.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: In the American West, Willet Gashade (Warren Oates), a former bounty hunter, and Coley Boyard (Will Hutchins), his dimwitted partner, are approached by a secretive young woman (Millie Perkins) who offers them money to guide her through the desert but refuses to discuss why she is traveling. The group embarks on the journey and is eventually joined by Billy Spear (Jack Nicholson), a volatile gunslinger the woman has also hired. The only question is why.

programme.title: Roger Corman: The Pope of Pop Cinema
programme.desc: "Roger Corman" is a by the numbers look at one of the most influential names in Hollywood; though many know him for his low budget exploitation movies, Roger Corman is also responsible for giving many names their start in the business.

programme.title: Stakeout on Dope Street
programme.desc: Three adolescents think their prayers have been answered when they stumble upon heroin abandoned by drug dealers.

programme.title: Made in England: The Films of Powell and Pressburger
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese reflects on the influence of filmmakers Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger, whose decades-long collaboration led to a series of classics that made the duo a crucial part of British cinema.

programme.title: Bachelor Mother
programme.desc: Polly Paris (Ginger Rogers) accidentally stumbles into motherhood after discovering an abandoned baby on the steps of an orphanage. Believing the baby is Polly's, department store owner J.B. Merlin (Charles Coburn) and his son David (David Niven) offer Polly a job -- but only if she takes responsibility for the child. Unemployed and in need of work, Polly accepts and all seems well, until her increasingly romantic relationship with David raises suspicions about the child's paternity.

programme.title: Bachelor Mother
programme.desc: Polly Paris (Ginger Rogers) accidentally stumbles into motherhood after discovering an abandoned baby on the steps of an orphanage. Believing the baby is Polly's, department store owner J.B. Merlin (Charles Coburn) and his son David (David Niven) offer Polly a job -- but only if she takes responsibility for the child. Unemployed and in need of work, Polly accepts and all seems well, until her increasingly romantic relationship with David raises suspicions about the child's paternity.

programme.title: I Love You Again
programme.desc: Larry Wilson (William Powell) is a wealthy businessman. He's also so incredibly boring that his wife, Kay (Myrna Loy), wants a divorce. But when Larry gets knocked on the head, he discovers that he isn't Larry Wilson at all. He's actually George Carey, a con artist, and his life as Larry has really been a case of amnesia. Now back to his old ways, George plans a con to rob an entire town of their money. But George's fiery ways make Kay reconsider the divorce.

programme.title: Tarzan's Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: A strange woman (Sara Shane) helps the ape man (Gordon Scott) stop a diamond hunter (Anthony Quayle) and his river gang.

programme.title: Easy Life
programme.desc: A teenager (Bernard Thomas) becomes a hardened criminal.

programme.title: It Happened in Brooklyn
programme.desc: After returning home from the war, soldier Danny Miller (Frank Sinatra) heads straight to his old stomping grounds in Brooklyn, N.Y. He's determined to attain success as a singer -- and help his friends reach their own dreams along the way. Danny moves in with old chum Nick Lombardi (Jimmy Durante) and falls head-over-heels in love with schoolteacher Anne Fielding (Kathryn Grayson). But will an upper-crust acquaintance (Peter Lawford) wreck his new romance?

programme.title: Berlin Express
programme.desc: During World War II, passengers of various nationalities travel by train from France to Berlin. One of them, Dr. Bernhardt (Paul Lukas), is an influential peacemaker who wants to mend the war-torn continent. When Nazi conspirators determined to keep Bernhardt quiet set off an explosion on the train, it kills a man who turns out to be Bernhardt's decoy. Other passengers (Merle Oberon, Robert Ryan, Robert Coote) seek the doctor for an explanation, but deception is all around.

programme.title: The Bad Seed
programme.desc: Air Force Colonel Kenneth Penmark (William Hopper) and his wife, Christine (Nancy Kelly), dote on their pig-tailed daughter, Rhoda (Patty McCormack) -- as does their lonely landlady, Monica Breedlove (Evelyn Varden). But self-centered Rhoda has a secret tendency for selfishness and loves to accumulate gifts, whether given or stolen, in her room. Christine keeps her knowledge of her daughter's darker side to herself, but when a schoolmate of Rhoda's dies mysteriously, her self-deception unravels.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: No sooner does Italian-American widow Loretta (Cher) accept a marriage proposal from her doltish boyfriend, Johnny (Danny Aiello), than she finds herself falling for his younger brother, Ronny (Nicolas Cage). She tries to resist, but Ronny lost his hand in an accident he blames on his brother, and has no scruples about aggressively pursuing her while Johnny is out of the country. As Loretta falls deeper in love, she comes to learn that she's not the only one in her family with a secret romance.

programme.title: Arsenic and Old Lace
programme.desc: Writer and notorious marriage detractor Mortimer Brewster (Cary Grant) falls for girl-next-door Elaine Harper (Priscilla Lane), and they tie the knot on Halloween. When the newlyweds return to their respective family homes to deliver the news, Brewster finds a corpse hidden in a window seat. With his eccentric aunts (Josephine Hull, Jean Adair), disturbed uncle (John Alexander), and homicidal brother (Raymond Massey), he starts to realize that his family is even crazier than he thought.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: When a public opinion surveyor working in the mountain district town of Plainville goes missing, fellow surveyor Pete Marshall (Fred MacMurray) is sent as his replacement. Visiting the hillbilly family of Mamie Fleagle (Marjorie Main), Pete begins to suspect with horror that she and her two sons have murdered the surveyor. Pete then comes to believe that Mamie is slowly poisoning wealthy Grandma Fleagle, who has put a vital clue to her fortune in a nonsensical embroidered sampler.

programme.title: 711 Ocean Drive
programme.desc: Mal Granger (Edmond O'Brien) is a telephone repairman with a passion for horse betting. He puts his electronics expertise to work assisting gangster Vince Walters (Barry Kelly) in expanding his illegal racing wire, and, when Walters is murdered, Granger takes over the operation. However, Granger's growing success is soon threatened by both Larry Mason (Donald Porter), an East Coast mobster who wants in on the action, and Lieutenant Pete Wright (Howard St. John), who's after Granger for murder.

programme.title: I Confess
programme.desc: Father Logan (Montgomery Clift) is a Catholic priest, but he finds his faith put to the test when he is accused of the murder of a wealthy member of his parish. The real murderer was Otto (O.E. Hasse), a poor German immigrant desperate for money, and Father Logan knows this because Otto confessed it to him. However, Father Logan is bound by the secrecy of the confessional and cannot share this evidence with the police, even if it means his own life.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Musician Manny Balestrero (Henry Fonda) needs money to pay for his wife Rose's (Vera Miles) dental procedure. When he tries to borrow money from their insurance policy, someone at the office mistakes him for a man who had robbed them twice at gunpoint. After Manny is arrested, his defense attorney, Frank O'Connor (Anthony Quayle), works to demonstrate that Manny has an alibi for the crimes. The stress of the case, however, threatens to destroy Manny's family before his name can be cleared.

programme.title: The Big Shot
programme.desc: Repeat offender Duke Berne (Humphrey Bogart) reluctantly agrees to go along with the robbery scheme of unscrupulous lawyer Martin Fleming (Stanley Ridges) when he realizes that Fleming's wife is his ex-flame Lorna (Irene Manning). Lorna talks Duke out of taking part, but, after the robbery goes bad, a corrupt witness fingers Duke as one of the gunmen. Fleming provides the innocent George Anderson (Richard Travis) to create an alibi for Duke, but soon the double-crossing begins.

programme.title: History Uncovered
programme.desc: Exploring if the Marshall Plan saved Europe from the misery and chaos instilled by World War II.

programme.title: History Uncovered
programme.desc: Mao Zedong opened a new era for the Middle Empire, but he did not bring the country to great world power.

programme.title: 100 Days to Victory
programme.desc: Canadian and Australian generals use new technology and the element of surprise to defeat the Germans.

programme.title: 100 Days to Victory
programme.desc: General Arthur Currie plans for Canadian Corps advances through Germany's Hindenburg Line.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: U.S. paratroopers that dropped into France before the D-Day landings battle Nazi defenders for a key bridge behind enemy lines.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: Five months after D-Day, the ground war finally arrives on German soil as British soldiers attack in the shadow of Hitler's infamous Siegfried Line.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: A platoon of American Buffalo Soldiers exceeds all expectations to advance on a Nazi-occupied castle in the foothills of Northern Italy.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: With thousands of German soldiers trapped in the Falaise Pocket, a small Canadian tank squadron tries to close off the escape route.

programme.title: Women Under Hitler's Flag
programme.desc: How girls' Hitler youth indoctrination evolved into wartime action.

programme.title: Women Under Hitler's Flag

programme.desc: Following the German blitzkrieg through Europe as Japan drags the US into the war.

programme.title: Weeks of War

programme.desc: How three key events in Asia and Europe created a global conflagration.

programme.title: Weeks of War

programme.title: Battlefields of the World Wars
programme.sub-title: Hedgerow Hell: The Fury of Normandy: 1944
programme.desc: Experts review the positives and negatives of the Allies' invasion of northern France, a long and hard-fought conflict which turned the tide of World War II.

programme.title: Battlefields of the World Wars
programme.desc: Parisians rise to help the Allied forces drive Germany out of the city they occupied for four years; Gen. Charles de Gaulle makes a public address in Paris.

programme.title: Battlefields of the World Wars
programme.desc: Scores of Canadian soldiers fall in a failed raid on a German port.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: A magazine article only credits Sheldon in an article about a paper he co-wrote with Leonard; a blackout at Mrs. Wolowitz's results in a final dinner in her honor.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon and Leonard are asked to speak at UC Berkeley, they take a detour in hope of meeting an idol; Raj and Amy try to settle a dispute between Howard and Bernadette with a game of ping pong.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy build a blanket fort -- and come to a crossroads in their relationship; Wolowitz meets a half-brother he didn't know he had; Leonard and Penny have an argument during an appearance on Wil Wheaton's podcast.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys fight over what message Raj should write for NASA in case of alien contact; Penny has to decide between auditioning for a movie or keeping her pharmaceutical sales job.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens intercept video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack Earth, using the games as models. Knowing that he must employ a similar strategy, President Will Cooper (Kevin James) recruits his childhood pal, former video-game champ and home-theater installer Sam Brenner (Adam Sandler), to lead a team of old-school arcade players and a military specialist (Michelle Monaghan) in an all-out battle to save the planet.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and special guest Karrueche Tran learn the dangers of chains in "Trip Chains," discover the source of Rob's dislike of wind in "Wind Assaults" and why Steelo hates raccoons in "Rac Bandits."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Rocsi Diaz hang out with some "Cool Bouncers"; celebrating people with heads of steel in "Destructo-Skulls"; getting messy in "Dirt Baths."

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy await big news.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Wolowitz leave their kids for the first time; Penny and Leonard try to keep a secret; Sheldon and Amy stick together; Koothrappali makes a new friend; the gang travels together into an uncharted future.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is happy to meet new neighbor Penny, but his roommate thinks he is chasing an impossible dream.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard volunteers to sign for a package, hoping to make a good impression on Penny.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Unhappy to learn that Penny is seeing someone, Leonard summons the courage to ask another woman on a date.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Getting fired gives Sheldon the opportunity to explore life beyond physics, but when he spends his time weaving ponchos and acting like a shut-in, Leonard calls Sheldon's mother for assistance.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, realizing his pursuit of Penny is fruitless, has an unexpected encounter with a fellow scientist (Sara Gilbert).

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Wolowitz and Koothrappali attend Penny's Halloween party.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Blended
programme.desc: Recently divorced mom Lauren (Drew Barrymore) and widowed dad Jim (Adam Sandler) let their friends push them into a blind date, which goes disastrously wrong. Unsurprisingly, neither wants to see the other ever again. However, fate intervenes when both Jim and Lauren, unbeknown to each other, purchase one-half of the same vacation package at a South African resort; they and their children are forced to share the same suite and participate in a slew of family activities together.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: All Happy Gilmore (Adam Sandler) has ever wanted is to be a professional hockey player. But he soon discovers he may actually have a talent for playing an entirely different sport: golf. When his grandmother (Frances Bay) learns she is about to lose her home, Happy joins a golf tournament to try and win enough money to buy it for her. With his powerful driving skills and foulmouthed attitude, Happy becomes an unlikely golf hero -- much to the chagrin of the well-mannered golf professionals.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo get baby betrayed in "Too Young to Trust," face their fear of "Scarecases" and ask bad behaving people "Why'd You Do That?"

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: Weather is unpredictable, and can threaten lives without warning; whether it's churning seas, deadly wildfires, or exploding volcanoes, no one is safe when good weather goes bad.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: When wild weather strikes, it takes just minutes, or sometimes only seconds, to turn an extraordinary scene into chaos; for unsuspecting onlookers, extreme weather can lead to sheer terror as Mother Nature's wrath descends upon them.
